zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Trowbridge於1482年出生時，他的父親John Trowbridge27歲，母親Alice Reed23歲。他於1510年與Anne Peck在英國薩默塞特布盧福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年4月18日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Trowbridge于1482年出生时，他的父亲John Trowbridge27岁，母亲Alice Reed23岁。他于1510年与Anne Peck在英国薩默塞特布盧福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年4月18日在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Trowbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset, Wiltshire and Hampshire): habitational name from Trowbridge in Wiltshire, named from Old English trēow ‘tree’ + brycg ‘bridge’; the name probably referred to a felled trunk serving as a rough-and-ready bridge.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Trowbridge was born in 1482, his father, John Trowbridge, was 27 and his mother, Alice Reed, was 23. He married Anne Peck in 1510, in Brushford, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 April 1548, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Anne Peck en 1510, à Brushford, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1548, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Trowbridge(이)가 1482년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Trowbridge(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Reed(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 서머세트 브루스h퍼드에서 Anne Peck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Trowbridge nasceu em 1482, seu pai, John Trowbridge, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Reed, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Peck em 1510, em Brushford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire,: аствелл вит фалкутт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Trowbridge родился в 1482 г., его отцу по имени John Trowbridge было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Reed, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Peck в 1510 г. в местности брушфорд, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 апреля 1548 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
